rationale: The citing paper’s core mechanism is functional attitude theory (social-adjustive vs. value-expressive motives), and the cited paper is a JMRK study that operationalizes the same attitude functions and shows their behavioral effects in consumer decisions. Given this strong construct/theory overlap (beyond a generic background citation) and the exact DOI match in the references, this pair could plausibly reflect a substantive theoretical source and should be reviewed in stage two.
